label: Lending Arb Dashboard
description: Cross-protocol lending rate comparison with spread and utilisation tracking across Aave, Morpho, Compound, and Kamino.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData().

0.8.note: — context does not expose error; TableWidget error prop unused; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn=[strategies,defi,overview]. 0.4 ✓ no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks imports — data via useStrategiesData(). 0.6 ✓ isLoading forwarded to TableWidget skeleton. 0.7 ✓ emptyMessage='No lending arb data available'. 0.8 NOTED — context does not expose error; TableWidget error prop unused; WidgetErrorBoundary covers thrown exceptions. 0.9 ✓ no dead code.

1.1.note: lendingArbData sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and applies org/client/strategy cascade. 1.3-1.5 ✓ scope cascade wired in context.

1.7.note: lending arb mock rows live in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ lendingArbData sourced exclusively from useStrategiesData() hook. 1.2 ✓ context calls useGlobalScope() and applies org/client/strategy cascade. 1.3-1.5 ✓ scope cascade wired in context. 1.6 ✓ empty scope = unfiltered dataset. 1.7 ✓ lending arb mock rows live in strategies-data-context.tsx (not in lib/mocks/).

findings: 0.8 NOTE: strategies-data-context does not surface API error field. Context silently falls back to mock data on error. WidgetErrorBoundary handles thrown exceptions. TableWidget error prop available but unused — acceptable given current context design.
Previously known issue resolved: data was inline MOCK_DATA; now sourced from strategies-data-context via useStrategiesData().
